description: This pipeline processes images by first filtering and converting 3D regions of interest, then overlaying and blending the resulting images, and finally exporting the output in a non-native format after applying physical pixel sizes and adjusting properties as needed, while also generating label images from the 3D regions of interest.

3c199696-39ba-4df0-8af0-17318f7a006f.name: iji-export-image-v2
3c199696-39ba-4df0-8af0-17318f7a006f.description:
Exports incoming images into a non-JIPipe format (PNG, JPEG, BMP, AVI, TIFF). Please note support for input images depending on the file format:
  • PNG, JPEG, BMP: 2D images only
  • AVI: 2D or 3D images only
  • TIFF: All images supported


This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

d59b4c6e-2a61-44c8-a3d9-9ad257b1298a.name: ij1-calibration-copy-physical-dimensions
d59b4c6e-2a61-44c8-a3d9-9ad257b1298a.description:
Copies the phyiscal pixel sizes from the source to the target

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

391b5a9d-ebdc-4c5a-a02d-83af33b0dbad.name: ij3d-roi-filter-by-overlap
391b5a9d-ebdc-4c5a-a02d-83af33b0dbad.description:
Filters the 3D ROI lists by testing for mutual overlap. The ROI1 output contains all ROI1 input ROI that overlap with any of ROI2. The ROI2 output contains all ROI2 input ROI that overlap with a ROI1 ROI.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

9874bb88-95f1-4af4-95a1-14befe8f196b.name: ij1-color-blend-images
9874bb88-95f1-4af4-95a1-14befe8f196b.description:
Overlays greyscale or RGB images.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

50be24fe-b7f3-4504-9999-c82fc4ddf9a5.name: ij3d-roi-change-properties
50be24fe-b7f3-4504-9999-c82fc4ddf9a5.description: Sets the properties of all 3D ROI

920f5f76-6bc5-4190-a754-29d451ccc2ea.name: ij1-calibration-copy-physical-dimensions
920f5f76-6bc5-4190-a754-29d451ccc2ea.description:
Copies the phyiscal pixel sizes from the source to the target

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

6868d232-cf2d-4d2d-94a8-c512537ad7fe.name: ij3d-roi-convert-to-rgb
6868d232-cf2d-4d2d-94a8-c512537ad7fe.description:
Converts 3D ROI lists to a label image. Depending on the number of objects, an 8-bit, 16-bit, or 32-bit label image is generated.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

bc54bb3d-4293-4eb2-b100-f0716a5fc297.name: ij3d-roi-change-properties
bc54bb3d-4293-4eb2-b100-f0716a5fc297.description: Sets the properties of all 3D ROI

340168be-5a87-4d3a-b9ff-b327148f1bac.name: ij1-calibration-copy-physical-dimensions
340168be-5a87-4d3a-b9ff-b327148f1bac.description:
Copies the phyiscal pixel sizes from the source to the target

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

6fe74e15-1881-4c46-a325-fa8fed774d29.name: ij3d-roi-convert-to-rgb
6fe74e15-1881-4c46-a325-fa8fed774d29.description:
